scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:setup: npm run db:push && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @chatai/db && npm run build -w @chatai/types && npm run build -w @chatai/utils && npm run build -w @chatai/frontend && npm run build -w @chatai/backend
